idea.hook: Billions of invisible particles are passing through you RIGHT NOW. 🤯
facts: Neutrinos are subatomic particles, almost massless and with no electric charge.
They're so weakly interactive, they can pass through light-years of lead without stopping.
Every second, over 100 TRILLION neutrinos from the Sun stream harmlessly through your body.
idea.payoff: You're a cosmic sieve, constantly perforated by a torrent of nearly undetectable matter from across the universe!
idea.title: You're a Neutrino HIGHWAY! 👻✨

scenes.text: Billions of invisible particles pass through you RIGHT NOW. 🤯
scenes.visual: A dark, starry space background. A faint, almost transparent human silhouette appears, with countless tiny, glowing dots (representing neutrinos) subtly streaming through it from all directions.

scenes.text: Neutrinos: subatomic, almost massless, no electric charge.
scenes.visual: Zoom in on a single, abstract representation of a neutrino – a tiny, featureless sphere with a subtle glow, against a deep space background.

scenes.text: They pass through light-years of lead without stopping.
scenes.visual: A large, dense-looking block of lead (stylized, dark grey/metallic) filling most of the screen. Hundreds of small, fast-moving particles stream continuously and effortlessly straight through the block without any interaction or slowdown.

scenes.text: 100 TRILLION from the Sun stream through YOU every second.
scenes.visual: A stylized sun on the left emitting a dense, steady stream of glowing particles towards a transparent human silhouette on the right. The particles pass directly through the person.

scenes.text: You're a cosmic sieve, perforated by matter from across the universe!
scenes.visual: A wide shot of Earth from orbit, or a person standing on Earth, with a cosmic background. Countless faint particle trails radiate from distant stars/galaxies and converge on/pass through the Earth/person, emphasizing the global scale of the phenomenon. Subtle shimmering effect on the particles.
